_comment: DO NOT EDIT: FILE GENERATED AUTOMATICALLY BY PTERODACTYL PANEL - PTERODACTYL.IO
name: The Ship: Murder Party
author: noreply@zyiks.eu
description: The Ship: Murder Party dedicated server. The native Linux server is broken on modern systems, so this runs the Windows dedicated server under Wine. Requires a licensed Steam account (anonymous is refused).
startup: python3 -u /home/container/udplog.py 27500 & NCPID=$!; grep -q rcon_password /home/container/ship/cfg/server.cfg 2>/dev/null || echo "rcon_password \"{{RCON_PASSWORD}}\"" >> /home/container/ship/cfg/server.cfg; wine srcds.exe -console +log on +logaddress_add 127.0.0.1:27500 +rcon_password "{{RCON_PASSWORD}}" -game ship -port {{SERVER_PORT}} +map {{SRCDS_MAP}} +maxplayers {{MAX_PLAYERS}} +ip 0.0.0.0 -strictportbind & SRVPID=$!; until rcon -a 127.0.0.1:{{SERVER_PORT}} -p "{{RCON_PASSWORD}}" "echo ready" </dev/null >/dev/null 2>&1; do kill -0 $SRVPID 2>/dev/null || { kill $NCPID 2>/dev/null; exit; }; sleep 3; done; rcon -a 127.0.0.1:{{SERVER_PORT}} -p "{{RCON_PASSWORD}}"; kill $NCPID 2>/dev/null

installation.script:
#!/bin/bash
# The Ship: Murder Party - Windows-server-under-Wine install script
#
# Server Files: /mnt/server
# Install image: ghcr.io/parkervcp/installers:debian
#
# The Ship's NATIVE LINUX dedicated server is broken on modern systems (heap
# corruption -> crashes during map load, "futex facility" abort on new glibc),
# so this egg installs and runs the WINDOWS dedicated server under Wine instead.
#
# Vars: STEAM_USER, STEAM_PASS, STEAM_AUTH (licensed account that OWNS The Ship -
#       anonymous returns "No subscription"), SRCDS_APPID=2403, INSTALL_FLAGS.

if [[ "${STEAM_USER}" == "" ]] || [[ "${STEAM_PASS}" == "" ]]; then
    echo -e "steam user is not set.\n"
    echo -e "Using anonymous user (note: app 2403 requires a licensed account).\n"
    STEAM_USER=anonymous
    STEAM_PASS=""
    STEAM_AUTH=""
else
    echo -e "user set to ${STEAM_USER}"
fi

cd /tmp
mkdir -p /mnt/server/steamcmd
curl -sSL -o steamcmd.tar.gz https://steamcdn-a.akamaihd.net/client/installer/steamcmd_linux.tar.gz
tar -xzvf steamcmd.tar.gz -C /mnt/server/steamcmd
mkdir -p /mnt/server/steamapps # fix steamcmd disk write error when this folder is missing
cd /mnt/server/steamcmd

chown -R root:root /mnt
export HOME=/mnt/server

## Force the WINDOWS platform - the native Linux build of The Ship is non-functional.
./steamcmd.sh +force_install_dir /mnt/server +login ${STEAM_USER} ${STEAM_PASS} ${STEAM_AUTH} $( [[ "${WINDOWS_INSTALL}" == "1" ]] && printf %s '+@sSteamCmdForcePlatformType windows' ) +app_update ${SRCDS_APPID} ${INSTALL_FLAGS} validate +quit

## steam client libraries (used by steamcmd; harmless for the wine runtime)
mkdir -p /mnt/server/.steam/sdk32
cp -v linux32/steamclient.so ../.steam/sdk32/steamclient.so 2>/dev/null || true
mkdir -p /mnt/server/.steam/sdk64
cp -v linux64/steamclient.so ../.steam/sdk64/steamclient.so 2>/dev/null || true

## UDP log listener: Source forwards live log events via UDP (logaddress); this prints
## them to the console (Wine block-buffers srcds stdout, so the UDP path is what streams live).
cat > /mnt/server/udplog.py <<'PYEOF'
import socket, sys
port = int(sys.argv[1]) if len(sys.argv) > 1 else 27500
s = socket.socket(socket.AF_INET, socket.SOCK_DGRAM)
s.bind(("127.0.0.1", port))
while True:
    data, _ = s.recvfrom(4096)
    line = bytes(b for b in data if 9 <= b < 127 or b == 10).decode("ascii", "replace")
    sys.stdout.write(line.rstrip("\n") + "\n")
    sys.stdout.flush()
PYEOF

echo "-----------------------------------------"
echo "Installation completed..."
echo "-----------------------------------------"

variables.name: Auto-update server
variables.description: Enable / disable auto-updating the server on restart.

variables.name: Windows install
variables.description: Forces SteamCMD to install/update the Windows server files (run under Wine). Do not change - the native Linux server is broken.

variables.name: Steam User
variables.description: Steam account that OWNS The Ship. Anonymous is refused (No subscription).

variables.name: Steam Password
variables.description: Password for the Steam account. Steam Guard must be OFF (headless SteamCMD cannot complete email Guard).

variables.name: Steam Auth (Guard code)
variables.description: Steam Guard code if required. Normally left blank with Guard off.

variables.name: RCON password
variables.description: Password for sending console commands from the panel via RCON. Set this to something secret.

variables.name: Map
variables.description: Default map to load on start (e.g. batavier, atalanta, huronian).

variables.name: App ID
variables.description: Steam app id for The Ship Dedicated Server. Do not modify.
